overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a futuristic city transitioning from commercial districts with digital billboards and palm-lined streets to industrial zones with debris and wreckage. The footage features high-fidelity ray-traced graphics with a cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial intersection with futuristic skyline

events.description: vehicle turns right at intersection, navigating around corner
road curves uphill with billboards appearing on hillside to the right

agents.ego_description: navigating through city streets, turning at intersections while maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in opposite direction, passing by on the left

entered.detail: tall glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents forming the city center backdrop
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
multi-story structures with glass fronts and signage at street level
large circular arena building with distinctive architecture visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving view through a futuristic commercial district. The vehicle navigates a right turn at an intersection with the city skyline visible ahead. Digital billboards and modern commercial buildings line the streets as the car accelerates onto a curving road leading toward an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined commercial avenue with gas stations

events.description: passing under concrete overpass, brief shadow cast across windshield
approaching intersection with traffic lights, slowing slightly

agents.ego_description: cruising down palm-lined avenue, passing gas stations and commercial storefronts

notable_agents.action: person walking on sidewalk near gas station, moving away from camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the avenue, creating a distinctive street canopy
futuristic fuel station with green canopy and digital price displays
multiple large advertising screens mounted on rocky hillside terrain

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives along a palm-tree-lined commercial avenue, passing under an overpass that briefly darkens the scene. Gas stations and roadside shops line the street as the car approaches an intersection. The environment transitions from dense urban core to a more open commercial strip with hillside billboards visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed commercial street with storefronts and utility poles

events.description: executing left turn at intersection, steering wheel visible rotation
road begins ascending slight incline with mountain terrain becoming visible

agents.ego_description: navigating left turn at intersection, continuing through commercial district with shops on both sides

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking on sidewalk, one wearing bright clothing

entered.detail: ground-level shops with awnings and signage, including neon-lit businesses
wooden power poles with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires lining the street
rocky hillside terrain visible beyond the urban structures

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a left turn at a busy intersection, entering a street lined with small commercial storefronts and utility poles. Palm trees continue to line the avenue while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. The terrain begins to rise in the distance, revealing mountainous landscape beyond the urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass transitioning to warehouse district

events.description: entering underpass, significant reduction in natural light, artificial lighting becomes dominant
exiting underpass into industrial zone with debris and abandoned structures visible

agents.ego_description: passing through underpass and emerging into industrial area, navigating around debris

entered.detail: concrete bridge underpass with metal support beams and graffiti on walls
large corrugated metal building with loading docks and industrial signage
red and white striped construction barriers blocking off damaged areas
abandoned and damaged cars piled along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete underpass, dramatically shifting from bright daylight to shadowed artificial lighting. Upon exiting, the environment transforms into a derelict industrial zone with abandoned warehouses, construction barriers, and crashed vehicles lining the road. The atmosphere shifts from vibrant commercial to post-industrial decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial wreckage zone with crashed airplane debris

events.description: large airplane wreckage comes into view, dominating the center of the scene
navigating through narrow passage between debris piles and concrete barriers

agents.ego_description: carefully maneuvering through narrow industrial alleyways, avoiding debris and wreckage

entered.detail: massive crashed aircraft fuselage with 'BIOCHEM' lettering visible on the side
green shipping containers and industrial dumpsters stacked near buildings
heavy concrete roadblocks channeling traffic through narrow passage
extensive debris field with scattered vehicle parts and industrial waste

segments.scene_description: The final segment navigates through a post-apocalyptic industrial wasteland dominated by a massive crashed airplane with 'BIOCHEM' signage. The vehicle weaves between concrete barriers, industrial containers, and scattered debris. The environment shows severe decay with abandoned structures, dried vegetation, and extensive wreckage creating a claustrophobic, hazardous driving path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective that transitions from a vibrant, high-tech commercial district into a desolate industrial wasteland. It begins by navigating a right turn through a futuristic urban core filled with digital billboards and towering skyscrapers before accelerating along a palm-lined avenue. As the vehicle passes under an overpass and through a busy intersection, the dense city architecture gives way to a more open commercial strip with mountains appearing on the horizon. The scene then shifts dramatically as the car enters a concrete underpass, emerging from the shadows into a derelict zone of abandoned warehouses and crashed vehicles. Finally, the environment transforms into a post-apocalyptic wasteland where the vehicle weaves through concrete barriers and scattered debris toward a massive crashed airplane marked with BioChem signage.
